name: Printed Apple Halloween Baby Blanket - Cloud Island™
description:
Keep your little one wrapped up in warmth with this Printed Apple Baby Blanket from Cloud Island™. Made from 100% recycled polyester fabric, this baby blanket feels soft, warm and comfortable against your baby's skin. Featuring allover apple print on a cream backdrop for a sweet look, it makes a great gift for baby showers.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
